item.description:
What's New

  • add macOS-11.3-20E5186d
  • add macOS-11.5-20G5052c
  • add macOS-11.5-20G5065a
  • add macOS-11.5-20G70
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5268h
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5284e
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5294g
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5304g
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5506j
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5522h
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5534d
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5543b
  • add macOS-12.0-21A5552a
  • add macOS-12.0.1-21A558
  • add macOS-12.1-21C5031d
  • add macOS-12.1-21C5039b
  • add macOS-12.1-21C5045a
  • add macOS-12.1-21C51
  • add macOS-12.2-21D5025f
  • add macOS-12.2-21D5039d
  • add macOS-12.2-21D48
  • add macOS-12.1-21C5021h
  • add validate command for IPSW integrity and hash sidecars
  • add macOS-11.0-20A5343i
  • add macOS-11.0-20A5354i
  • add macOS-11.0-20A5364e
  • add macOS-11.0-20A5374g
  • add macOS-11.0-20A5374i
  • add macOS-11.0-20A5384c
  • add macOS-11.0-20A5395g
  • add macOS-12.3-21E5196i
  • add macOS-12.3-21E5206e
  • add macOS-12.3-21E5212f
  • add macOS-12.3-21E5222a
  • add macOS-12.3-21E5227a
  • add release counts and device-specific toggle to sidebar
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5266r
  • add macOS-13.4-22F2073

Fixes

  • retry curl on partial transfer errors (exit 18)
  • correct ipswFile to Apple filename and fix 3 corrupted URLs
  • derive ipswFile from ipswURL instead of local path
  • add missing betaNumber to macOS 12.3 beta 1 (21E5196i)

Under the Hood

  • add scripts/ directory with lint-json and format-release-notes
